name: Crockpot Hungarian Goulash
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds Round steaks, cut into 1/2 inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Put steak cubes, onion, and garlic into the crockpot.
2. Stir in flour and mix to coat the steak cubes evenly.
3. Add all remaining ingredients except sour cream, mixing well.
4. Cover and cook on Low for 8-10 hours (High: 4-5 hours, stirring well).
5. About 30 minutes before serving, add sour cream and stir thoroughly.
